description: Detects patterns that may cause panics: .unwrap(), .expect(), panic!(), todo!(), unimplemented!(), unreachable!(). Simplified from Rust: flags all .unwrap()/.expect() method calls without filtering for .lock()/.read()/.write() chains, SAFETY comments, or test context. Severity is uniformly 'warning' (no main() downgrade or unreachable! info distinction).

flag.message: unwrap/expect call detected -- may panic at runtime
